creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #4)

I'm especially concerned about unconditional textproc/yelp-tools and textproc/gtk-doc in build deps. Trying to avoid all python-related stuff as much as possible, and building it to fix PATH issue seems a bit excessive price to pay for me.
Unfortunately, I have to refrain of previous plan. There's too much changes in proposed patch beyond issue described here, and I'm lacking of time now to deal with that.
